{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = alchemy (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Alchemy is the manifestation of Aetheric properties by mixing them together.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
